stimulus: To survive when food is limited, larvae inside certain freshwater snail eggs ______blank a quiescent state known as estivation. In this state, development is suspended for several months—much longer than the typical activity period of an adult snail.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. A main clause requires a finite verb to express the action of the subject. The finite present tense verb “enter” correctly indicates what the larvae do.

Choices A, B, and C are all nonfinite verb forms (to-infinitive, present participle, perfect participle) that cannot serve as the main verb of the clause.
